sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: HIVE Digital Technologies Ltd. (NASDAQ:HIVE) Q3 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: HIVE Digital Technologies Ltd. (NASDAQ:HIVE) reported a record Q3 2026, achieving $93.1 million in revenue and $32.1 million in gross operating margin, despite a net loss driven by non-cash charges. The company emphasized its strategic expansion in both Bitcoin mining (reaching 25 exahash) and high-performance computing (HPC), projecting significant ARR growth for its GPU cloud services. HIVE highlighted its conservative financial approach, focusing on operational efficiency, a strong balance sheet without excessive debt, and a dynamic strategy for Bitcoin holdings to navigate market volatility and capitalize on AI infrastructure demand.

feed.title: FDA reverses course and will review Moderna’s mRNA flu shot, company says
feed.summary: Moderna announced that the FDA has reversed its initial refusal and will now review the company's new mRNA seasonal flu vaccine. The FDA had initially rejected Moderna's application due to concerns about the control arm of its trial. Moderna has since proposed a revised regulatory approach, seeking full approval for adults aged 50-64 and accelerated approval for those 65 and older, with a potential launch for the 2026-2027 flu season.

feed.title: Wingstop Posts Upbeat Q4 Earnings, Joins Caesars Entertainment, Garmin, Sabre And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Wednesday
feed.summary: Wingstop Inc. (NASDAQ: WING) shares surged over 17% after reporting better-than-expected adjusted EPS for Q4, though sales slightly missed estimates. Several other companies, including Caesars Entertainment, Garmin, and Sabre, also saw significant gains on Wednesday due to strong earnings and positive corporate news. The overall U.S. stock market experienced an uptick, with the Dow Jones index rising by approximately 250 points.

feed.title: J.M. Smucker to Invest $20.5M in Kansas Pet Food Plant
feed.summary: The J.M. Smucker Co., through its subsidiary Big Heart Pet Brands, Inc., is investing $20.5 million to expand its pet food manufacturing facility in Topeka, Kansas. The investment includes $17.8 million in real property and $2.7 million in equipment, supported by $383,000 in economic development incentives from local authorities. This expansion aims to support the continued growth of popular brands like Meow Mix and Milk-Bone and reinforces Smucker's long-standing commitment to the Topeka community.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson Expands U.S. Footprint with more than $1 Billion Investment in Next Generation Cell Therapy Manufacturing Facility in Pennsylvania
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson announced an investment of over $1 billion to build a new cell therapy manufacturing facility in Montgomery County, Pennsylvania. This facility will significantly expand J&J's U.S. manufacturing capacity for its advanced medicines and is expected to create over 500 permanent biomanufacturing jobs and more than 4,000 construction jobs, further boosting Pennsylvania's economy. The investment is part of the company's commitment to invest $55 billion in the U.S. by early 2029 to manufacture the majority of its advanced medicines domestically.

feed.title: AI Claim Assistant Now Taking Auto Damage Claims Calls at Travelers
feed.summary: Travelers Companies has launched its AI Claim Assistant, an intelligent voice service that uses OpenAI model capabilities to handle customer auto damage claim calls. The new assistant provides comprehensive service, guiding customers from consultation through claim submission, offering policy information, and expediting the claims process. Travelers plans to expand the AI assistant to other lines of business and is upskilling call center employees for more strategic roles.

feed.title: A $1B bet on cell therapy: J&J plant to bring over 4,000 Pa. construction jobs
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson is investing over $1 billion in a new cell therapy manufacturing facility in Montgomery County, Pennsylvania. This facility will create more than 4,000 construction jobs and 500 biomanufacturing jobs, bolstering the state's economy and J&J’s U.S. manufacturing capabilities. The investment is part of the company's broader $55 billion U.S. investment plan to produce advanced medicines domestically.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson will spend $1 billion on a cell therapy plant on its campus near Ambler
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson plans to invest over $1 billion to construct a cell therapy manufacturing facility on its Janssen campus near Ambler, Montgomery County, Pennsylvania. This new plant is expected to create 500 jobs and will enhance J&J's capacity to produce cell therapy treatments for various diseases. The investment is supported by $41.5 million in state aid from the Pennsylvania government, highlighting the region's growing hub for life sciences and manufacturing.

feed.title: Insulet Corporation Reports 31% Annual Revenue Growth; Authorizes $350 Million Repurchase Increase
feed.summary: Insulet Corporation reported a 31% increase in annual revenue for 2025, reaching $2.7 billion, driven by strong international sales and expansion of its Omnipod 5 user base. The company also authorized a $350 million increase to its share repurchase program and outlined a strategic roadmap including $1 billion in R&D investment and market expansion. Insulet projects 20-22% revenue growth for 2026 and aims to significantly increase its penetration in the Type 2 diabetes market.

feed.title: EQT Corp says Mountain Valley Pipeline flowed 6% above its nameplate capacity during winter storm Fern - conf call
feed.summary: EQT Corp announced that its Mountain Valley Pipeline performed exceptionally during winter storm Fern, flowing 6% above its nameplate capacity. This operational update was shared during a conference call. EQT Corp specializes in natural gas and also noted its visibility on significant data center capacity under construction.

feed.title: Global Payments stock surges after introducing strong guidance, $2.5B buyback (GPN:NYSE)
feed.summary: Global Payments (GPN) saw its stock climb 10% after issuing a robust outlook for 2026, surpassing analyst expectations for adjusted EPS and net revenue growth. The company's board also authorized up to $2.5 billion in stock buybacks, including a $550 million accelerated share repurchase plan. These initiatives, along with its focus on becoming a pure-play merchant solutions provider, are expected to return over $2 billion to shareholders in 2026 and enhance shareholder value.

feed.title: Emerson at Citi’s Conference: Strategic Focus on Industrial Software
feed.summary: Emerson Electric Company presented at Citi’s Global Industrial Tech & Mobility Conference 2026, highlighting its strategic focus on industrial software and resilience against AI threats. The company emphasized robust growth prospects, strong order momentum, and commitment to returning $10 billion to shareholders. Despite weaknesses in China and Europe, Emerson sees optimism in the U.S. and the Middle East, with R&D investments focusing on AI integration within existing software solutions.

feed.title: Amcor USI Partnership Creates Innovation Program
feed.summary: Amcor and the University of Southern Indiana (USI) have teamed up to launch an innovation program focused on addressing real-world consumer packaging challenges. This pilot internship program, running through USI's Center for Applied Research, will involve seven USI students and Amcor professionals collaborating to develop practical packaging concepts. The initiative aims to provide students with hands-on experience and career development while strengthening the local workforce in the Evansville area.

feed.title: Global Payments Stock Jumps. Here’s Why.
feed.summary: Global Payments (GPN) stock experienced its largest same-day percentage increase in nearly a year following a solid fourth-quarter earnings report and an optimistic outlook for 2026. This surge indicates strong confidence in the financial software provider's future performance. The gains are attributed to both the latest quarterly results and other underlying factors contributing to the positive sentiment.

feed.title: Evinova Announces Strategic Collaborations with Astellas, AstraZeneca and Bristol Myers Squibb Advancing Its AI-Native Platform to Accelerate Global Clinical Development
feed.summary: Evinova has announced strategic collaborations with Astellas Pharma Inc., AstraZeneca, and Bristol Myers Squibb to enhance global clinical development through its AI-native platform. These partnerships involve sharing operational data to improve recommendations and accelerate clinical trials. The platform aims to address fragmented systems and manual processes in drug development, leveraging AI to optimize workflows and reduce costs.

feed.title: PIRELLI CONFIRMED AS A “TOP 1%” COMPANIY IN S&P GLOBAL’S 2026 SUSTAINABILITY YEARBOOK, THE ONLY TYRE MANUFACTURER WORLDWIDE
feed.summary: Pirelli has been recognized as a "Top 1%" company in S&P Global’s 2026 Sustainability Yearbook, making it the only tire manufacturer worldwide to achieve this distinction. This highest level of recognition is based on an analysis of the ESG performances of over 9,200 companies globally, reflecting Pirelli's 86-point score in the 2025 Corporate Sustainability Assessment. The company emphasizes its commitment to sustainable development, technological investment, and transparent value chain management.

feed.title: Monster Beverage stock hits 52-week high at $83.30 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Monster Beverage (MNST) stock recently hit a new 52-week high of $83.30, showcasing a significant 60.75% increase over the past year. This achievement is attributed to strong investor confidence and the company's robust performance, as well as positive outlooks from various investment firms. Analysts have raised price targets for MNST, citing potential for domestic and international growth, strong expansion history, and success in its zero sugar product line.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams Is Up 14% in 2026. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go Next
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) stock has risen 14% in 2026 due to strong earnings growth and margin expansion despite a soft demand environment. Analysts project continued growth, with a target price of $445, suggesting the stock is undervalued given its consistent performance, strategic pricing, and market share gains. The company's valuation model, based on revenue growth, operating margins, and exit P/E multiple, indicates a potential 21% upside.

feed.title: Charles River Laboratories Announces Executive Appointments
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. (NYSE: CRL) has announced two significant executive appointments to strengthen its leadership team. Glenn G. Coleman will join as Corporate Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer on April 6th, bringing over 30 years of financial and operational experience in the healthcare sector. Kerry Dailey will join as Corporate Senior Vice President and Chief Legal Officer on March 30th, overseeing legal, compliance, communications, government relations, security, and ESG initiatives.

feed.title: Insights Ahead: Live Nation Entertainment's Quarterly Earnings
feed.summary: Live Nation Entertainment (NYSE: LYV) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on Thursday, February 19, 2026. Analysts project an EPS of $-1.04, and investors will be looking for the company to surpass estimates and provide positive guidance. In the previous quarter, the company missed its EPS by $0.70, which led to a 10.59% drop in share price.

feed.title: Insights into Targa Resources's Upcoming Earnings
feed.summary: Targa Resources (NYSE: TRGP) is set to release its quarterly earnings report on Thursday, 2026-02-19, with analysts projecting an EPS of $2.39. Investors are keenly awaiting both the earnings results and future guidance, as market reactions are often heavily influenced by the latter. The company's shares have shown a positive trend, up 11.1% over the past 52 weeks, indicating a bullish sentiment among long-term shareholders ahead of the announcement.

feed.title: In Warner Merger Battle, Netflix Needs To Take “More Action” To Prove It Loves Movie Theaters, Cinemark CEO Says
feed.summary: Cinemark CEO Sean Gamble stated that Netflix needs to demonstrate consistent action, beyond just comments, to show its commitment to traditional theatrical release windows, especially amid the potential Warner Bros. Discovery acquisition. Gamble expressed apprehension among exhibitors about Netflix’s recent pledges, citing past contradictory remarks from its management. He emphasized the need for firmer assurances regarding release windows, continued investment, and sustained marketing to ensure long-term stability for theatrical exhibition.

feed.title: Ali Dibadj Executes Sell Order: Offloads $6.27M In Janus Henderson Group Stock
feed.summary: Ali Dibadj, CEO of Janus Henderson Group (NYSE: JHG), sold 127,632 shares of company stock for $6.27 million on February 18, 2026. This insider transaction comes as Janus Henderson Group shows a positive financial overview with significant revenue growth and strong profitability metrics, despite its market capitalization being below the industry average. Insider transactions, while not the sole factor, provide insights into a company's financial health and management's perspectives.

feed.title: NMG awards key contracts for Phase-2 of Matawinie graphite mine
feed.summary: Nouveau Monde Graphite (NMG) has awarded key construction contracts for its Phase-2 Matawinie Mine project, representing over 50% of the project's CAPEX. These contracts, which include civil works, construction management, and steel structures, are conditional upon a positive final investment decision (FID). NMG aims to de-risk financing and ensure timely project execution by securing top-tier partners and fostering collaboration with Indigenous communities like the Atikamekw First Nation of Manawan.

feed.title: AI-powered Intuit Enterprise Suite gets new reseller for mid-market firms
feed.summary: Fourlane, a top-ranked Intuit QuickBooks Solution Provider, has been appointed an official reseller of Intuit Enterprise Suite. This partnership expands Fourlane's role to provide software licensing, implementation, and advisory services for Intuit's cloud-based, AI-native ERP solution aimed at mid-market organizations. The collaboration seeks to help businesses scale by leveraging AI-driven insights, automation, and real-time financial visibility.

feed.title: GM Stock Up 42% in 6 Months: Worth Holding Onto for More Gains?
feed.summary: General Motors (GM) stock has gained 42% in the past six months, outperforming peers, driven by strong vehicle offerings, a growing software business, and a restructured EV strategy. While near-term challenges like tariffs exist, GM's strong fundamentals, including a dominant U.S. market share, cost-reduction efforts, and increased shareholder returns, position it for long-term growth. The company also offers a robust 2026 outlook and appears undervalued, suggesting it's a worthwhile hold for long-term investors.

feed.title: Valley Wealth Sells $11 Million of Invesco KBW Bank ETF
feed.summary: Valley Wealth Managers, Inc. sold 134,355 shares of the Invesco KBW Bank ETF (KBWB) for an estimated $10.6 million in the fourth quarter of 2025. This move reduced their KBWB stake to 0.9% of their 13F AUM, reflecting potential concerns about the growth outlook for banks due to anticipated interest rate cuts in 2026. Despite KBWB outperforming the S&P 500 in the past year, lower interest rates are expected to pressure bank net interest margins.

feed.title: Hormel selling whole-bird turkey business
feed.summary: Hormel Foods Corp. is selling its whole-bird turkey business to Life-Science Innovations (LSI) to reduce its exposure to volatile commodity markets and focus on value-added protein products. The transaction includes a production facility and feed mill in Minnesota, and LSI will provide co-manufacturing services during a transition period. The Jennie-O brand name and its broader product line are not affected by this sale.

feed.title: Charles River Laboratories (CRL) Q4 revenue, adjusted earnings top expectations
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories (CRL) reported stronger-than-expected revenue and adjusted earnings for the fourth quarter of fiscal 2025, despite a slight decline in revenue to $994.2 million. The company's adjusted earnings per share were $2.39, surpassing analysts' forecasts. For fiscal 2026, management anticipates revenue to be flat to up 1.5% and provided an adjusted EPS guidance range of $10.70 to $11.20.

feed.title: Key highlights from Analog Devices’ (ADI) Q1 2026 earnings results
feed.summary: Analog Devices (ADI) reported strong first-quarter 2026 earnings, with revenue increasing 30% year-over-year to $3.16 billion and net income more than doubling. The company's adjusted EPS rose 51% to $2.46. For the second quarter of 2026, ADI forecasts continued growth, expecting revenue of $3.5 billion and adjusted EPS of $2.88.

feed.title: Verisk Analytics Q4 2026 Earnings Results
feed.summary: Verisk Analytics reported strong Q4 2025 financial results, exceeding analyst expectations for earnings and demonstrating steady revenue growth. The company attributed its performance to a robust subscription-based business model, strategic pricing initiatives, and ongoing investments in data, technology, and AI-driven solutions. Verisk expects continued growth driven by recurring revenue, pricing improvements, and expansion of its analytics and technology offerings.

feed.title: Humana Expands Florida Primary Care Reach As Shares Trade Below Targets
feed.summary: Humana's CenterWell has acquired MaxHealth, a Florida-based primary care provider, significantly expanding its presence in the state. This acquisition supports Humana's value-based care model for Medicare patients. Despite the strategic move, Humana's shares (NYSE:HUM) are trading below analyst targets and have shown weak performance recently, though Simply Wall St considers them undervalued.

feed.title: RTX Corporation (NYSE:RTX) Announces $0.68 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: RTX Corporation has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.68 per share, payable on March 19th to shareholders of record on February 20th, resulting in an annualized dividend of $2.72 and a 1.3% yield. The dividend is well-covered by earnings, with a payout ratio of 40.6% and analysts projecting a future payout ratio of 39.8%. The company recently reported strong Q4 results, beating EPS and revenue estimates, and provided solid FY2026 EPS guidance.

feed.title: Travelers (TRV) Unveils AIClaim Assistant to Enhance Claims Proc
feed.summary: Travelers (TRV) has launched its new AIClaim Assistant, powered by OpenAI technology, to streamline auto damage claims via an intelligent voice service. The company, a significant player in the property and casualty insurance industry with a market cap of $64.7 billion, plans to expand this AI tool to other business areas. While Travelers shows strong financial health and stable market position, insider selling activity warrants attention from investors.

feed.title: NeuroSense Reports 65% Lower Mortality Risk and 14-Month Survival Gain for PrimeC in ALS Trial
feed.summary: NeuroSense Therapeutics announced long-term survival data from its Phase 2b trial of PrimeC for ALS, demonstrating a significant 14-month survival gain for continuously treated patients compared to those who started on placebo. The data also indicate a 65% reduced risk of death, strengthening the case for PrimeC's advancement into late-stage development. Despite these positive clinical results, TipRanks' AI Analyst Spark rates NRSN as Neutral due to weak financial performance and elevated funding risks.

feed.title: Tide Unveils New Type Of Detergent: 'Significant Leap Into The Future'
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble has launched Tide evo, a new dry, fiber-based laundry tile designed as an alternative to Tide Pods and traditional detergents. This innovation, which dissolves instantly in cold water, represents over ten years of development and is positioned as the next significant step in laundry care. Tide evo is gradually rolling out nationwide and is expected to be as impactful as Tide Pods, contributing to Tide's environmental goal of increasing cold-water washes.

feed.title: Rothschild & Co Redburn Adjusts Halliburton Price Target to $40 From $35, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Rothschild & Co Redburn has increased its price target for Halliburton Company (HAL) to $40 from $35, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook for the oil-related services provider. The report was published on February 18, 2026, at 09:47 am EST.

feed.title: Humana commits $1.7 million to Illinois healthcare initiatives
feed.summary: Humana Inc. has announced over $1.7 million in new investments for Illinois healthcare initiatives, focusing on housing stability, workforce development, healthcare disparities, and access to maternal and behavioral healthcare services. This expands on previous grants, bringing their total commitment to over $3

feed.title: Eastman Chemical (EMN) Analyst Rating Update: Evercore ISI Raises Price Target | EMN Stock News
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has maintained its "In-Line" rating for Eastman Chemical (EMN) and increased its price target from $70.00 to $75.00. This adjustment reflects a 7.14% increase and follows several other optimistic adjustments by leading analysts in early February 2026. Despite a recent downgrade by RBC Capital, the consensus among 18 brokerage firms indicates an "Outperform" status for EMN, with an average target price of $76.06.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Raises Price Target for Ecolab (ECL) to $312 | ECL Stock News
feed.summary: Evercore ISI Group has raised its price target for Ecolab (ECL) to $312, maintaining an "Outperform" rating. This adjustment reflects a 4% increase from the previous target and mirrors similar upward revisions from other analysts like BMO Capital, Exane BNP Paribas, Wells Fargo, Stifel, and Citigroup, indicating a generally positive sentiment towards Ecolab. The average one-year price target from 20 analysts is $322.67, suggesting a 6.21% upside from the current price, though GuruFocus's GF Value estimate suggests a potential downside.

feed.title: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies stock hits all-time high at 262.55 USD
feed.summary: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies Corp (Wabtec) has reached an all-time high stock price of $262.55, marking a 34.75% increase over the past year. This surge is attributed to strong investor confidence and solid financial results in Q4 2025, with earnings and revenue surpassing analyst expectations. Stephens has raised its price target for Wabtec to $290, maintaining an Overweight rating.

feed.title: Parsons subsidiary SealingTech awarded $500 million cyber defense contract
feed.summary: Parsons Corporation's subsidiary, Sealing Technologies (SealingTech), has been awarded a $500 million sole-source contract by the United States Cyber Command (USCYBERCOM) for its Joint Cyber Hunt Kit solution. This three-year contract represents new business for Parsons, a company whose stock has declined by nearly 23% in the past six months and recently missed its Q4 2025 earnings expectations. The award underscores SealingTech's long-standing collaboration with the Department of War's Defense Innovation Unit and USCYBERCOM to develop advanced defensive cyber technologies, despite recent financial challenges faced by the parent company.

feed.title: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies stock hits all-time high at 262.55 USD
feed.summary: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies (Wabtec) stock has reached an all-time high of $262.55, reflecting a 34.75% increase over the past year and strong investor confidence. The company reported robust Q4 2025 financial results, with EPS and revenue surpassing analyst expectations, leading Stephens to raise its price target to $290 while maintaining an Overweight rating. Wabtec also boasts an impressive record of 32 consecutive years of dividend payments.

feed.title: JPMorgan Adjusts Price Target on General Mills to $42 From $46, Maintains Underweight Rating
feed.summary: JPMorgan has lowered its price target for General Mills (GIS) from $46 to $42 while maintaining an "Underweight" rating. This adjustment reflects a more cautious outlook on the food processing company's stock. The news article also highlights similar price target adjustments from other major financial institutions.

feed.title: L3Harris Is Up 28% in the Last 6 Months. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies (LHX) has seen its stock climb 28% in the last six months, trading near its 52-week high, driven by strong Q4 results, a record backlog, and solid 2026 guidance. The company projects revenue of $23.0 billion to $23.5 billion for 2026, with an implied upside of 16% to a target price of $402 based on valuation models. Key factors supporting this growth include sustained defense spending, major contract awards, and plans for an IPO of its Missile Solutions business in H2 2026.

feed.title: How Ralph Lauren and Microsoft are shaping luxury retail’s next era
feed.summary: Ralph Lauren and Microsoft have maintained a 25-year partnership that has significantly shaped luxury retail's integration with the digital world. Their collaboration, highlighted at NRF 2026: Retail’s Big Show, focuses on blending storytelling with commerce to enhance customer experience, exemplified by their new AI-powered conversational shopping tool, "Ask Ralph." This innovation aims to foster deeper customer connection and internal collaboration within Ralph Lauren.

feed.title: Moderna dealt blows in ongoing patent dispute with Arbutus
feed.summary: Moderna has faced setbacks in its ongoing patent dispute with Arbutus Biopharma concerning its mRNA COVID-19 vaccine. A federal judge in Delaware dismissed two key defenses presented by Moderna, specifically rejecting their argument based on obviousness. This decision could impact the direction of the patent litigation between the two companies.

feed.title: 2026 Honda Civic Hybrid Wins Edmunds Top Rated 2026 Award
feed.summary: The 2026 Honda Civic Hybrid has received the Edmunds Top Rated Car Award for 2026, marking the fourth time the 11th-generation Civic has earned this distinction. Edmunds recognized the hybrid for its sporty design, safety performance, driving dynamics, and value. The vehicle features Honda's fourth-generation two-motor hybrid-electric powertrain, emphasizing fuel-efficiency without sacrificing performance or space.

feed.title: XME Rode Gold to a Near Double, Now Freeport’s Q2 Restart Will Test the Rally
feed.summary: The SPDR S&P Metals & Mining ETF (XME) has nearly doubled in the past year, driven by surging gold prices and increasing copper demand. While Newmont has seen significant free cash flow from high gold prices, Freeport-McMoRan's planned Q2 2026 restart of its Grasberg mine will be a critical test for the ETF's future performance, which also hinges on commodity price stability and production execution by its top holdings.

feed.title: JFB Construction to Merge with XTEND, Form Defense Robotics Leader
feed.summary: JFB Construction Holdings is merging with XTEND Reality Expansion Ltd. to form XTEND AI Robotics, Inc., a Nasdaq-listed defense robotics leader. The all-stock agreement, valued at $1.5 billion, will create a U.S.-based company focused on AI-driven autonomous defense technology, with JFB repositioning from construction to advanced defense. JFB recently raised $10 million through a private securities offering, with part of the proceeds intended for investment in XTEND.
